report.xPost: BTC 62,700 resistance holds as extreme fear at index level 21 confirms range-bound liquidity absorption until macro catalysts break structure or volume expands beyond current consolidation bands.
report.intelligence:
SUMMARY
Market is in a short-term squeeze with BTC at $62,700 driven by ETF inflows and massive short liquidations ($8M long liqs vs $69M shorts), but underlying stablecoin supply contraction signals risk-off capital rotation. Extreme Fear (21/100) contrasts sharply with overbought 4h RSI levels on majors, creating a volatile handoff to Asia/Europe where the key question is whether buying pressure can sustain above resistance or if OI unwinding triggers a flush. The thesis relies on continuation of short squeeze momentum; invalidation occurs if funding rates stabilize near zero and volume dries up before 08:00 SAST.

IN-DEPTH ANALYSIS
The confluence of extreme negative sentiment (Fear/Greed 21) with aggressive long positioning creates a classic contrarian setup, yet the data suggests this is not pure capitulation but rather a forced short squeeze fueled by liquidations. Stablecoin supply
